fields.name: Lemon Herb Chicken Bowls
fields.description: Grilled chicken served with rice, cucumber, tomatoes, and a lemon herb yogurt sauce.
instructions: Cook rice according to package directions.
Season and grill chicken until cooked through.
Slice vegetables and mix yogurt with lemon and parsley.
Assemble bowls with rice, chicken, vegetables, and sauce.

fields.name: Turkey Taco Skillet
fields.description: A quick one-pan taco skillet with ground turkey, beans, corn, and warm spices.
instructions: Brown turkey in a skillet.
Add beans, corn, salsa, and seasoning.
Simmer until hot and slightly thickened.
Top with cheese before serving.

fields.name: Salmon Rice Plates
fields.description: Roasted salmon with steamed rice, broccoli, and a simple soy ginger glaze.
instructions: Cook rice and steam broccoli.
Whisk soy sauce, ginger, honey, and garlic.
Roast salmon with glaze until flaky.
Serve salmon with rice and broccoli.

fields.name: Veggie Pesto Pasta
fields.description: Pasta tossed with pesto, zucchini, spinach, tomatoes, and parmesan.
instructions: Cook pasta until al dente.
Saute zucchini and tomatoes.
Toss pasta with pesto, vegetables, and spinach.
Finish with parmesan.

fields.name: Greek Yogurt Parfaits
fields.description: Layered Greek yogurt, berries, granola, and honey for an easy breakfast.
instructions: Add yogurt to bowls or jars.
Layer with berries and granola.
Drizzle with honey and serve.

fields.name: Sheet Pan Fajita Bowls
fields.description: Chicken, peppers, and onions roasted on one sheet pan and served over rice.
instructions: Slice chicken, peppers, and onion.
Toss with seasoning and oil.
Roast until chicken is cooked through.
Serve over rice with lime.

fields.name: Chickpea Curry
fields.description: A pantry-friendly chickpea curry simmered with coconut milk and warm spices.
instructions: Simmer tomatoes, coconut milk, and curry powder.
Add chickpeas and cook until warmed through.
Stir in spinach until wilted.
Serve with rice.

fields.name: Breakfast Burritos
fields.description: Freezer-friendly burritos filled with eggs, potatoes, cheese, and salsa.
instructions: Cook potatoes until tender.
Scramble eggs and warm beans.
Fill tortillas with eggs, potatoes, beans, cheese, and salsa.
Wrap and freeze or serve warm.
